meaning: 吉尔伽美什(传说中的苏美尔国王)
examples: Gilgamesh is the semidivine king of Erech.
The story opens with a description of Gilgamesh.
Gilgamesh was the hero of the ancient Sumerian epic poem, the Song of Gilgamesh, written about 2900 B.C..
Visitors to the show are greeted by an imposing figure long considered to be Gilgamesh.
In the professions they choose, it is unlikely that they will need to quote Rousseau, or recount the Epic of Gilgamesh.
